runs.note: Fixed security headers after Cloudflare proxy migration: set X-Frame-Options to DENY, added missing HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options (nosniff), Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, and proper Cache-Control headers. Updated getTrustedClientIP to only trust X-Forwarded-For from Cloudflare IPs for security.
